query:
BEGIN;
INSERT INTO public.forum_room_topics (id, room_id, title, period_start)
SELECT v.topic_id, v.room_id, v.title, now()
FROM (VALUES
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-foreign-roots-t1', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-foreign-roots', '日本語指導をどう充実させるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-foreign-roots-t2', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-foreign-roots', '母語・母文化の保持を学校はどこまで支援すべきか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-foreign-roots-t3', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-foreign-roots', '多言語対応をどこまで進めるべきか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--gifted-talent-education-t1', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--gifted-talent-education', '特異な才能のある子への支援は必要か'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--gifted-talent-education-t2', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--gifted-talent-education', '才能教育は「えこひいき」か「合理的配慮」か'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--gifted-talent-education-t3', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--gifted-talent-education', '飛び級を柔軟に認めるべきか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--educational-poverty-gap-t1', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--educational-poverty-gap', '貧困家庭の子の学習支援を学校はどこまで担うべきか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--educational-poverty-gap-t2', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--educational-poverty-gap', '教育格差の是正に何が最も有効か'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--educational-poverty-gap-t3', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--educational-poverty-gap', '無償化はどこまで進めるべきか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--gender-education-t1', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--gender-education', '名簿・呼称・制服のジェンダー配慮をどう進めるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--gender-education-t2', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--gender-education', '「男女平等」と「区別」の線引きをどこに置くか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--gender-education-t3', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--gender-education', 'ジェンダー教育はどこまで踏み込むべきか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--sex-education-t1', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--sex-education', '性教育をどこまで踏み込んで行うべきか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--sex-education-t2', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--sex-education', '「はどめ規定」をどう考えるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--sex-education-t3', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--sex-education', '性の多様性をどう教えるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-coexistence-t1', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-coexistence', '多文化共生をどう学校文化に根づかせるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-coexistence-t2', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-coexistence', '宗教・文化的配慮（給食・服装等）をどこまで行うか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-coexistence-t3', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--multicultural-coexistence', '「同化」と「共生」の違いをどう考えるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--night-junior-high-t1', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--night-junior-high', '学び直しの機会をどう保障するか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--night-junior-high-t2', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--night-junior-high', '夜間中学を全自治体に設置すべきか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--night-junior-high-t3', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--night-junior-high', '義務教育未修了者への支援をどう広げるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--medical-care-children-t1', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--medical-care-children', '医療的ケア児の通常学級での学びをどう支えるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--medical-care-children-t2', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--medical-care-children', '看護師・人員配置をどう確保するか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--medical-care-children-t3', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--medical-care-children', '保護者の付き添い負担をどう軽減するか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--diverse-learning-places-t1', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--diverse-learning-places', 'フリースクールを正式な学びの場と認めるべきか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--diverse-learning-places-t2', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--diverse-learning-places', 'ホームスクーリングをどこまで認めるか'),
  ('room-diversity-inclusion--community--diverse-learning-places-t3', 'room-diversity-inclusion--community--diverse-learning-places', '「学校に通う」以外の選択肢をどう保障するか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-work-style-reform-t1', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-work-style-reform', '教員の働き方改革のために何を削るべきか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-work-style-reform-t2', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-work-style-reform', '残業の上限規制を実効性あるものにするには'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-work-style-reform-t3', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-work-style-reform', '「子どものため」という言葉が長時間労働を生んでいないか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-shortage-recruitment-t1', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-shortage-recruitment', '教員不足をどう解消するか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-shortage-recruitment-t2', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-shortage-recruitment', '社会人・民間人材の登用をどう進めるか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-shortage-recruitment-t3', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-shortage-recruitment', '教員の待遇改善に何が最も必要か'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-licensure-t1', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-licensure', '教員免許制度は今のままでよいか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-licensure-t2', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-licensure', '教職課程に何を加え、何を減らすべきか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-licensure-t3', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-licensure', '免許更新制の廃止は妥当だったか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-training-t1', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-training', '教員研修は教育の質向上に役立っているか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-training-t2', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-training', '研修の時間をどう確保するか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-training-t3', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--teacher-training', '研修内容を誰が決めるべきか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--club-community-transition-t1', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--club-community-transition', '部活動の地域移行を進めるべきか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--club-community-transition-t2', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--club-community-transition', '地域移行の費用を誰が負担すべきか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--club-community-transition-t3', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--club-community-transition', '地域移行で部活動の教育的意義は保たれるか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--school-consolidation-t1', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--school-consolidation', '小規模校の統廃合をどう判断すべきか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--school-consolidation-t2', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--school-consolidation', '学校は地域コミュニティの核として残すべきか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--school-consolidation-t3', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--school-consolidation', '統廃合による通学負担をどう考えるか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--school-family-community-t1', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--school-family-community', '学校・家庭・地域の役割分担をどう設計するか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--school-family-community-t2', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--school-family-community', 'コミュニティ・スクールは機能しているか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--school-family-community-t3', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--school-family-community', '地域人材の活用をどこまで進めるべきか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--parent-demands-t1', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--parent-demands', '過剰な保護者要求に学校はどこまで応じるべきか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--parent-demands-t2', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--parent-demands', '保護者対応の負担を誰がどう支えるか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--parent-demands-t3', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--parent-demands', '学校と保護者の「信頼関係」をどう築くか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--principal-leadership-t1', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--principal-leadership', '管理職に求められるリーダーシップとは何か'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--principal-leadership-t2', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--principal-leadership', '管理職のなり手不足をどう解消するか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--principal-leadership-t3', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--principal-leadership', '学校の意思決定をどこまで民主化すべきか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--education-governance-t1', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--education-governance', '教育委員会は形骸化していないか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--education-governance-t2', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--education-governance', '教育の政治的中立性をどう保つか'),
  ('room-teacher-school-system--community--education-governance-t3', 'room-teacher-school-system--community--education-governance', '現場の裁量と行政の統制のバランスをどう取るか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--japanese-language-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--japanese-language', '国語でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--japanese-language-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--japanese-language', '漢字の手書き指導はどこまで必要か'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--japanese-language-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--japanese-language', '話す・書く力をどう評価するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--mathematics-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--mathematics', '算数・数学でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--mathematics-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--mathematics', '電卓・数式アプリを授業でどこまで使わせるか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--mathematics-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--mathematics', '「なぜ数学を学ぶのか」にどう答えるか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--science-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--science', '理科でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--science-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--science', '知識の習得と探究的な学びのバランスをどう取るか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--science-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--science', '理科離れをどう食い止めるか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--social-studies-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--social-studies', '社会でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--social-studies-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--social-studies', '現代の論争的なテーマをどこまで扱うべきか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--social-studies-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--social-studies', '主権者教育・シティズンシップをどう育てるか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--english-foreign-language-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--english-foreign-language', '英語でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--english-foreign-language-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--english-foreign-language', '文法・読解と会話のどちらを優先すべきか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--english-foreign-language-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--english-foreign-language', 'AI翻訳がある時代に英語を学ぶ意味は何か'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--moral-education-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--moral-education', '道徳でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--moral-education-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--moral-education', '「正解のある道徳」になっていないか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--moral-education-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--moral-education', '価値観の多様性をどう扱うか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--pe-health-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--pe-health', '体育・保健でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--pe-health-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--pe-health', '競争・順位づけは体育に必要か'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--pe-health-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--pe-health', '保健（性・健康・安全）をどこまで踏み込むか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--music-art-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--music-art', '音楽・美術でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--music-art-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--music-art', '技能の習得と自由な表現のどちらを重視すべきか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--music-art-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--music-art', '芸術教育の時間削減をどう考えるか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--home-economics-technology-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--home-economics-technology', '技術家庭科でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--home-economics-technology-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--home-economics-technology', '生活スキルの教育を学校はどこまで担うべきか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--home-economics-technology-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--home-economics-technology', '技術科とプログラミング・ものづくりをどう統合するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--integrated-inquiry-time-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--integrated-inquiry-time', '総合的な学習でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--integrated-inquiry-time-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--integrated-inquiry-time', '教科横断の学びをどう設計するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--integrated-inquiry-time-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--integrated-inquiry-time', '成果をどう評価し、何を学びとするか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--information-subject-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--information-subject', '情報でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--information-subject-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--information-subject', '情報モラルと情報技術のどちらを重視すべきか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--information-subject-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--information-subject', '大学入試科目「情報」をどう位置づけるか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--career-guidance-t1', 'room-subject-teaching--community--career-guidance', '進路指導でAIをどう活用するか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--career-guidance-t2', 'room-subject-teaching--community--career-guidance', '進路指導は「偏差値」から脱却できるか'),
  ('room-subject-teaching--community--career-guidance-t3', 'room-subject-teaching--community--career-guidance', '変化の激しい時代に何を基準に進路を示すか')
) AS v(topic_id, room_id, title)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET room_id = EXCLUDED.room_id, title = EXCLUDED.title;
COMMIT;
